Stop.command: cmd /c "bun test --coverage 1>&2"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Error "If coverage is unclear, check ./coverage/lcov.info"; exit 2 }
cmd /c "pmd cpd index.js --language ecmascript --minimum-tokens 50 --ignore-literals --ignore-identifiers 1>&2"; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 2 }
